name: obsidian-tools
description: Route external content and save normalized content into Obsidian vaults for downstream knowledge workflows.

interface.longDescription: Obsidian Tools provides a user-facing save-to-obsidian router plus a generic content-to-Obsidian ingestion layer. Source-specific fetchers such as twitter-fetch or china-content-fetcher produce normalized content JSON; content-to-obsidian checks vault configuration, selects a vault, creates Markdown, references media manifests, and writes vault files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Save this URL or normalized content into the configured Obsidian vault.
